summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of redesigned Simple Football stat-tracking mode at /demo/football/simple. All 11 features tested and working correctly. This is a demo mode with structured workflows for broadcasters.
critical_code_review_comments: SimpleFootballLiveGame.jsx is well-structured with proper component separation (PlayerNumberInput, YardsInput, TacklerSelect, TeamScoreCard, GameClock, QuickStats)
All workflows use Dialog components with proper step-by-step progression
Remember QB feature works correctly - pre-fills QB number on subsequent passes
Undo functionality properly saves state snapshots (up to 20 history items)
Safety scoring correctly adds points to OTHER team as per football rules
Page fits on screen without scrolling (1080px viewport height)
seed_data_creation: Demo mode uses static initial data (Central Wolves vs Riverside Panthers with pre-populated rosters)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Simple Football mode is a frontend-only demo at /demo/football/simple. All features working: Rush workflow (carrier -> yards -> tackler), Pass workflow (QB with remember -> yards -> receiver -> tackler), Field Goal (kicker -> distance -> good/no good), Penalty (team -> search penalty -> forward/backward), Turnover (fumble/interception/turnover on downs), scoring buttons (TD +6, XP +1, 2PT +2, Safety +2 to other team, FG +3), possession toggle, clock controls, first down, undo.

page_load_no_scrolling.notes: Page height (1080px) equals viewport height - no scrolling required

steps: Click Rush button -> Dialog opens
Type player # (22) -> Derrick Henry appears in suggestions
Press Enter or click Confirm -> Yards dialog opens
Click Continue -> Tackler select dialog
Select tackler or 'No Tackle / Out of Bounds'
Stats updated: Rush yards and Total yards
Click Pass button -> QB select dialog with 'Remember this player for future plays' checkbox
Type QB # (1) -> Tom Brady appears
Check Remember checkbox -> Click Confirm
Yards dialog -> Enter yards -> Continue
Receiver select dialog -> Type receiver # (13) -> Mike Evans
Tackler select dialog -> Select tackler or No Tackle
Stats updated: Pass yards and Total yards
pass_workflow.remember_feature: QB #1 is pre-filled on subsequent passes when Remember is checked

steps: Click FG button -> Kicker select dialog
Type kicker # (3) -> Jake Moody
GOOD button -> +3 points, toast 'Field Goal Good!'
NO GOOD button -> Change of possession, toast 'Missed FG - Change of Possession'
Click Penalty button -> Team select dialog (Central Wolves / Riverside Panthers)
Select team -> Penalty search dialog with type-to-search
Search 'Hold' -> Holding (10 yds) appears
Select penalty -> Forward/Backward yards buttons
+10 yards (Forward) or -10 yards (Backward)
penalty_workflow.game_log: FLAG: Holding on Riverside Panthers - +10 yards

steps: Click Turnover button -> Turnover type dialog
Options: Fumble, Interception, Turnover on Downs
Select type -> Possession changes automatically
Turnovers stat incremented for team that lost ball

first_down_button.notes: Increments first downs counter for team with possession

tests: TD button adds +6 points to team with possession
XP button adds +1 point to team with possession
2PT button adds +2 points to team with possession
Safety button adds +2 points to OTHER team (correct football rule)

possession_indicator.notes: Yellow ring (ring-2 ring-yellow-400) around team card shows possession, football emoji badge visible

stats_panel.notes: Shows Rush/Pass/Total yards, Turnovers, 1st Downs for both HOME and AWAY teams

undo_button.notes: Reverts last action, restores previous state including scores, possession, stats, timeouts. Toast shows 'Undone!'

tests: Play/Pause button toggles clock running state
Quarter change with up/down arrows (1st, 2nd, 3rd, 4th, OT)

mocked_api_note: DEMO MODE - This is a frontend-only demo with no backend API calls. Stats are not persisted.
